name: I have a pre-existing back issue that worsened at work in Millcreek, can I claim?
description: Yes if work aggravated—prove with medical evidence[1].

mainEntity.name: I have a pre-existing back issue that worsened at work in Millcreek, can I claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if work aggravated—prove with medical evidence[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if work aggravated it—Utah covers conditions arising from employment.** Need medical evidence of causation beyond daily life[1]. **Key factors:** Doctor opinion key; not just recurrence. **Practical guidance:** Report fully, get specialist eval linking aggravation to job, document prior records. Avoid gaps in proof. **Aggravation claims often approved.**
